title: [Device Support Request] Tuya TS0011 – _TZ3000_aetquff4 (1-Gang Wall Switch)
aiAnalysis:
Based on the GitHub issue, here is the extracted structured device information:

## Device Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Device Name** | Tuya 1-Gang Wall Switch |
| **Model ID** | TS0011 |
| **Manufacturer Name** | `_TZ3000_aetquff4` |
| **Device Type** | End Device (battery-powered, `receiveWhenIdle: false`) |
| **Application Profile ID** | 260 (Zigbee HA) |
| **Application Device ID** | 256 (On/Off Light) |

## Endpoint Details

| Endpoint | Input Clusters | Output Clusters |
|----------|----------------|-----------------|
| 1 | 0x0003 (Identify), 0x0004 (Groups), 0x0005 (Scenes), 0x0006 (On/Off), 0x0000 (Basic) | 0x0019 (OTA), 0x000A (Time) |

## Capabilities

- **Power Source**: Battery (mains-powered: false)
- **Receive When Idle**: false (sleepy device)
- **Security**: false
- **Allocate Address**: true

## Key Attributes

| Cluster | Attribute | Value |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| On/Off (0x0006) | onOff | false (off) |
| On/Off (0x0006) | onTime | 0 |
| On/Off (0x0006) | offWaitTime | 0 |
| Basic (0x0000) | zclVersion | 3 |
| Basic (0x0000) | appVersion | 80 |

## Driver Assignment

This device is a **ZCL-only** (non-Tuya DP) single-gang switch. It should be assigned to the **`switch_1gang`** driver.

### Fingerprint to Add
```json
{
  "manufacturerName": "_TZ3000_aetquff4",
  "productId": "TS0011"
}
```

### Notes
- No Tuya cluster (0xEF00) detected — this is a standard ZCL On/Off device
- No DP mappings needed
- Requires `requiresExplicitBinding: true` for attribute reporting (BSEED-like behavior)
- Battery-powered, so first report may take up to 24 hours
- No `measure_battery` capability needed (no PowerConfiguration cluster)
